Patented software · Since 2009 · 20+ countries

Next generation |

A customer touch point has two sides. Finally, both of them work. For fifteen years, ID24 has pioneered customer-facing technology - for staff working stores, front desks and bank offices. We re-invented anything from the paper form, customer display hardware to fraud detection using AI.

Patented technology

Duo Input —
simultaneous interaction

Duo Input™ is an ID24 patented software that enables true simultaneous touch input across multiple displays. Perfect for digital forms in a bank office, or a loyalty registration form in a store or hotel.

  • ✓ Two people can work on two screens at the same time, and it just works.
  • ✓ no cursor conflicts, no interruptions, no operating-system workarounds.
  • ✓ Works on top of any existing POS, banking system, or hotel PMS — no system changes required
  • ✓ Available on all compatible hardware: D|2 displays, Adyen SFO1, Wacom, or any consumer tablet
PRV Patent Application no. 2030154-5 · G06F3/0488 · G06F3/041

Display 1

Name confirmation

Signature

Display 2

Signature

Market need

What does it cost to not have a modern customer display?

Without interactive customer displays, retailers miss loyalty data, lose customer trust at checkout, and struggle to detect internal fraud before it becomes costly.

80% of Sweden's largest retail chains

lack modern customer displays — limiting transaction transparency and reducing customer trust at the point of sale.

A common challenge in specialty retail

is that many customers don't know whether they are already members. With ID24, customers can do a quick membership lookup and register in the same flow — right at checkout.

Cashier fraud costs retailers millions every year

One retail employee at Cervera transferred 349,556 SEK over 9 months via 166 fraudulent returns — before it was discovered manually. ID24's AI detects these patterns automatically, in real time.

Customer data enrichment

Collect missing email addresses and phone numbers directly at the register without disrupting the cashier flow.

Backup payments

Continue processing payments even during network outages — no lost sales, no downtime.

Retail media

Display targeted advertising to every paying customer at the point of sale.

Fraud detection

Monitor suspicious cashier behavior and transaction anomalies in real time with AI.

Customer loyalty

Loyalty programs and digital receipts drive repeat purchases and stronger customer relationships.

CRM integration

Real-time offers and targeted campaigns delivered directly within the in-store flow.

Modernising the bank office experience

Digitalisation in banking is still taking time. Many agreements remain on paper, and the process of filling out forms on an associate's monitor — shifting it back and forth between advisor and customer — creates unnecessary friction.

Paperwork still dominates bank offices

Many customer agreements and onboarding forms are still completed manually, creating delays and a poor experience at branch level.

Associates share a single screen with the customer

The awkward back-and-forth of rotating a monitor so the customer can sign or fill in details is a daily frustration and a source of errors. ID24's Duo Input lets both parties interact simultaneously on a dedicated second display.

Digitalisation takes time — we bridge the gap

ID24 integrates with existing banking business systems without requiring changes to core infrastructure. The customer-facing display adds a modern digital interaction layer on top of what already exists.

Simultaneous input

Advisor and customer fill in fields at the same time — no monitor-sharing, no waiting.

No core system changes

Works alongside existing banking business systems with no integration required on day one.

Digital form completion

Replace paper agreements with interactive digital forms directly on the customer display.

Customer identification

NFC-based ID verification and member lookup integrated into the advisor workflow.

Signature & consent

Capture signatures and consent digitally — directly on the display, GDPR-compliant.

Pilot in 8–12 weeks

Remote installation and full support — no internal IT effort needed to get started.

CRM VALUE

Unlock your true CRM value

We help retail chains maximize the value of their CRM in-store — improving conversion and enabling smooth data collection, registration, and profile updates.

Registration 01
Identification 02
Update data 03
Real-time offers 04

The key to unlock your true CRM value

Four capabilities, one connected in-store CRM journey.

Our methodology

The three-pillar model

For over 15 years, we have combined customer-driven data collection, gamification, and structured execution to deliver measurable improvements across multi-unit retail and hotel networks. We are now bringing this same proven methodology into the financial services sector.

01

Data collection

Capture customer data at checkout or at the desk in real time — email, mobile number, loyalty points — without disrupting the workflow.

02

Gamification

Scoreboards, digital punch cards, and store competitions engage customers and staff — driving performance with live KPI rankings.

03

Execution

Full project management — from remote installation and software testing to ongoing analysis, reporting, and optimization.

Products

A complete software & hardware ecosystem

Over 50 modules covering everything from receipts and loyalty registration to AI-powered fraud detection — all integrated without touching your existing system.

Second display software

Interactive customer-facing display showing the receipt, offers, and data collection forms in real time.

Desktop / Mobile

Duo Input

Patented technology (PRV G06F3/0488) — advisor and customer interact on the same screen simultaneously, without conflicts.

Desktop · Patented

Email validation

Patented helper-button keyboard with quick-fill domains (@gmail, @hotmail) speeds up email collection at the register.

Web · EU Design Patent

POS analysis

Analyze cashier and transaction patterns to identify inefficiencies and optimization opportunities across all locations.

Desktop

Admin panel

Centralized web dashboard for managing content, schedules, modules, and performance data across all devices.

Web

Gamification

Scoreboards and store rankings that increase customer engagement and surface real-time performance KPIs.

Web

Virtual barcode scanners

Software-based barcode scanning directly from the display — no separate scanner hardware required.

Desktop

Blurry barcode decoder

AI-assisted decoding of damaged or low-quality barcodes — reduces checkout errors and delays.

Desktop / Mobile
New

Cashier fraud detection AI

AI analysis identifies anomalies in discounts, returns, and cashier activity — flagging risks in real time or via reports.

Desktop / Web
New

D|2 displays

Own-brand hardware with front-mounted NFC reader, integrated camera, and robust metal construction in 8", 10", 13.3" and 15.6".

Hardware
New

Digital punch cards

Replace paper stamp cards with digital loyalty cards connected directly to your POS or business system.

Web
New

Kiosk software

Self-service kiosk mode for member registration, product lookup, and loyalty management on mobile devices.

Mobile

Hardware

Compatible hardware for every environment

ID24 works with any consumer-grade tablet (Android, iOS, Windows) as well as purpose-built displays with NFC and camera. Adyen and Wacom hardware is also supported.

Adyen SFO1
8"

Adyen SFO1 8"

Android with NFC

✓ NFC payments
D2 T2
10"

D2 T2 10"

Android with NFC + camera

✓ NFC + camera

10.1" / 13.3" / 15.6"

D2 HDMI monitor

10.1", 13.3" & 15.6" with NFC

✓ Robust metal design
Wacom
DTU-1141B / DTC141W0

Wacom displays

10" & 14" monitor (no NFC)

✓ Stylus input
Any consumer tablet

Patents & protection

Innovative solutions with protection

Protected core

Simultaneous input

Protection around assisted interactions where cashier and customer operate in parallel, without collisions or OS-level workarounds.

Protected UX

Helper-button keyboard

Design-protected field assistance that reduces friction and accelerates collection tasks such as email capture.

Why it matters

Protection that becomes positioning

For modern B2B buyers, patents are not just legal assets. They signal product originality, strengthen category ownership, and create confidence that the workflow is difficult to copy.

Defensibility
Stronger moat
Speed
Lower friction
Position
Enterprise trust

AI & Security

Cashier fraud detection AI

Our AI anonymously analyzes every transaction — discounts, returns, error registrations, cashier activity — to detect anomalies and flag potential risks before they escalate.

✓
Fewer cashier errors and return fraud incidents
✓
Lower operational costs and shrinkage
✓
Stronger internal control across all stores
✓
Increased security for both staff and customers
Real-world case: Cervera retail chain

A store employee transferred 349,556 SEK over 9 months through 166 fraudulent returns — undetected until a store manager manually reviewed the POS system. ID24's AI would have flagged the pattern within days.

How it works
Transaction data Discounts · Returns · Cashier activity · Error registrations
↓
AI analysis Industry-standard & custom algorithms
↓
✓ Improvements Efficiency · Best practices
⚠ Risks flagged Fraud · Policy violations

FAQ

Everything you need to know

Duo Input is a patented technology (Swedish Patent Office PRV, application no. 2030154-5, classification G06F3/0488 — "Apparatus and Method for Supporting Touch Input Events") that allows the advisor or cashier and the customer to interact on the same screen simultaneously without technical conflicts. It applies across banking, retail, and hotel settings.
No. ID24 integrates seamlessly with existing POS systems, banking business systems, and hotel property management systems (PMS) without any modifications. The software runs on a separate device and communicates passively with your existing setup.
A pilot typically goes live within 8–12 weeks from sign-off. ID24 handles remote installation, software testing, and customization with full support included — no internal IT effort required on your side.
Primarily retail, banking, and hotels. With 15+ years of experience and software installed in 20+ countries, ID24 is now bringing the same proven three-pillar methodology (Data Collection, Gamification, Execution) into the financial services sector with a dedicated banking solution.
The AI anonymously analyzes transaction data — discounts, returns, error registrations, and cashier activity patterns — against industry benchmarks and custom algorithms. Store managers receive actionable insights in real time or via weekly reports.
Any consumer-grade Android, iOS, or Windows tablet works with ID24's software. Purpose-built options include the D|2 range with integrated NFC and camera in 8", 10", 13.3", and 15.6" sizes. The Adyen SFO1 8" (Android with NFC), Wacom DTU-1141B 10", and Wacom DTC141W0 14" displays are also supported.
